title: Prismatic Pioneers
subtitle: An engaging quiz event focused on exploring the fascinating concepts of light, its properties, and its interactions with matter. The session encouraged participants to deepen their understanding of optics and photonics through an interactive and thought-provoking format.
description:
Event: Prismatic Pioneers 
 Objective of the Event: This quiz is designed to challenge your knowledge and understanding of light, its properties, and its interactions with matter. Light, one of the fundamental phenomena in physics, behaves in fascinating ways that are crucial to our understanding of the universe. From the dual nature of light as both a wave and a particle to its spectrum and the phenomena it produces, this quiz will explore various aspects of optics and photonics.Benefits in terms
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Quiz-based event focused on optics and photonics concepts.
Tested knowledge of light, its properties, and interactions with matter.
Encouraged analytical thinking and conceptual understanding.
